## edu-cli exam-node add-paper-code

Add a paper code to an exam node (为考试节点添加试卷代码)

```
edu-cli exam-node add-paper-code [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --exam-node-id uint    Exam node ID (required)
  -h, --help                 help for add-paper-code
      --paper-code-id uint   Paper code ID (required)
```
